{{Infobox character
| name = Whitehall
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
| name = Whitehall
| aliases = Elder Whitehall
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Elder, Jade leader
| abilities = Heaven’s Lance technique
| affiliations = Heaven's Glory School
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Whitehall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Elder Whitehall is a [[Jade]]-level leader within the [[Heaven's Glory]] School. Although he possesses the appearance of an eleven or twelve-year-old child, this is a deceptive physical state caused by an elixir he created in his youth to combat his fear of aging. While outsiders believe him to be a child prodigy, this is actually a misconception maintained by the school's elders to protect their reputation. Whitehall is a practitioner of [[Jade madra]] and has demonstrated significant combat capabilities, such as using golden light to strike targets. He is driven by a desire to ensure the survival and strength of his school, even if it requires acting dishonorably or prioritizing the acquisition of treasures over personal pride. In confrontations, he has shown a willingness to use lethal force or attempt to cripple opponents to achieve his goals.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|As an elder and [[Jade]] leader of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School, Whitehall is identified by a [[Jade]] arrow badge worn upon his chest. During his interactions with [[Lindon]], he provided the youth with a token. Although his spirit has reached the [[Jade stage]], his physical body remains at the [[Iron stage]]. In combat, he utilizes the Heaven’s Lance technique while wielding a [[halfsilver]] dagger. He is also seen as a child dressed in bloodstained white robes, and upon his passing, he leaves behind a golden [[Remnant]] shaped like a deformed imp or twisted dwarf.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder [[Whitehall]] wears a [[Jade]] arrow badge on his chest.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder [[Whitehall]] provided [[Lindon]] with a token.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] is an elder of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder [[Whitehall]]'s body is at the [[Iron stage]] and his spirit is at the [[Jade stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder [[Whitehall]] uses the Heaven’s Lance technique.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] is a [[Jade]] leader of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] is a child wearing bloodstained white robes.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] wields a [[halfsilver]] dagger.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] leaves behind a golden [[Remnant]] that looks like a twisted dwarf or deformed imp.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Whitehall]] is an old man trapped in a boy's body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Heaven’s Glory School]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
